canonical_definition: Benchmark with 828 programming problems evolved from HumanEval using GPT-4, including semantic-altering and semantic-preserving variants to test robustness and efficiency.
papers: EffiCoder: Enhancing Code Generation in Large Language Models through Efficiency-Aware Fine-tuning
EpiCoder: Encompassing Diversity and Complexity in Code Generation
